1.premise: Restaurant-order stereotypes become fake language skills.

lines.text: Watch your mouth.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Shut the fuck up in the back.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Stay put.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm from New York City.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I don't know you guys act like you don't fucking understand me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but I can speak any language.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I look at somebody who's Spanish.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Where are you?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I throw one word at you.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: What's up?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Let me get a bacon, egg, and cheese poppy.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You know, people do it to Italians all the time.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They come to fuck a little lily
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and they start acting Italian,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: the guys got freckles and shit.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Let me get a chicken cutlet parmesan,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: fresh butts in our red peppers,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: tell your sister, "G" and I ain't say, "How you doing?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: This guy's fucking Norwegian.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: You know where you never do it though?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You never see nobody go to a Chinese restaurant
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and say, "I act the Chinese, no?"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Lay home, man!
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Let me get a pork fried rice.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Don't forget the wonton soup.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: They don't do it.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: They get disrespectful.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They start yelling.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Lays my pork fried rice!"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: They think you can understand them if you talk loud, you know?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: They're disrespectful.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: See, I always show them respect.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, let's say, for instance, I go for a steak,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I bring the bones home,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I bring it to the restaurant for the dork,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: the buried in the yard.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: How you doing?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I was gonna say they ate the dork,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: but then I said somebody might fuck me up out here.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I see a couple Asians.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Kim Jong-un's over there, what's up, Mo?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: How does it feel to never ride a roller coaster?
lines.label: tag
